title: rosa canina subvar. firmula
intro: Rosa canina subvar. firmula, also known as the dwarf dog rose, is a variety of the Rosa canina species, a flowering plant that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The dwarf dog rose is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of using Rosa canina subvar. firmula include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
